name: methyl group to 1-hexadecyl-sn-glycero-3-…
summary: A 9-step route from methyl group to 1-hexadecyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate(2−), ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: DNA oxidative demethylase
reactions.equation: a methylated nucleobase within DNA + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = a nucleobase within DNA + formaldehyde + succinate + CO2

reactions.name: tRNA-2-methylthio-N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine synthase
reactions.equation: N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + (sulfur carrier)-SH + AH2 + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 2-methylsulfanyl-N(6)-dimethylallyladenosine(37) in tRNA + (sulfur carrier)-H + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: N(6),N(6)-dimethyl-L-lysyl(4)-[histone H3] + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = N(6)-methyl-L-lysyl(...
reactions.equation: N(6),N(6)-dimethyl-L-lysyl(4)-[histone H3] + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = N(6)-methyl-L-lysyl(4)-[histone H3] + formaldehyde + succinate + CO2

reactions.name: N(6)-methyl-L-lysyl(4)-[histone H3] + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = L-lysyl(4)-[histone H3] + f...
reactions.equation: N(6)-methyl-L-lysyl(4)-[histone H3] + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = L-lysyl(4)-[histone H3] + formaldehyde + succinate + CO2

reactions.name: a (2R,3S,4S)-leucoanthocyanidin + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = a (4S)-2,3-dehydroflavan-3,4-di...
reactions.equation: a (2R,3S,4S)-leucoanthocyanidin + 2-oxoglutarate + O2 = a (4S)-2,3-dehydroflavan-3,4-diol + succinate + CO2 + H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: alanopine dehydrogenase
reactions.equation: 2,2'-iminodipropanoate + NAD(+) + H2O = L-alanine + pyruvate + NADH + H(+)

reactions.name: [methyl coenzyme M reductase]-L-arginine C-5-methyltransferase
reactions.equation: L-arginyl-[methyl-coenzyme M reductase] + AH2 + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = (5S)-C-methyl-L-arginyl-[methyl-coenzyme M reductase] + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: GTP + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3'-deoxy-3',4'-didehydro-GTP + 5'-deoxyadenosine ...
reactions.equation: GTP + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3'-deoxy-3',4'-didehydro-GTP + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: UTP + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3'-deoxy-3',4'-didehydro-UTP + 5'-deoxyadenosine ...
reactions.equation: UTP + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3'-deoxy-3',4'-didehydro-UTP + 5'-deoxyadenosine + L-methionine + A + H2O + H(+)

reactions.name: tetraether lipid synthase
reactions.equation: 2 archaetidylglycerol + 2 AH2 + 4 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = glycerol dibiphytanyl glycerol tetraether glycerophospholipid + 4 5'-deoxyadenosine + 4 L-methionine + 2 A + 4 H(+)

reactions.name: all-trans-retinyl hexadecanoate + H2O = all-trans-retinol + hexadecanoate + H(+)
reactions.equation: all-trans-retinyl hexadecanoate + H2O = all-trans-retinol + hexadecanoate + H(+)
